features.evidence: It is a very large laptop with full size keyboard, amazing lights and fast. I finally have been able to play cyberpunk in VR 🙂Also the mechanical keyboard is AMAZING!!
and if you don't have a problem with fan noise (I use headphones), running it at max settings is awesome. Be careful, it gets very hot, burns and makes a lot of noise.
I was concerned about the touchpad
If aesthetics are not your main priority and you value performance and productivity above all, this laptop is an excellent choice for demanding tasks.
If aesthetics are not your main priority and you value performance and productivity above all, this laptop is an excellent choice for demanding tasks.
In my case, I use it for geology and mining applications, specifically for geological modeling software and running heavy calculations, and it performs very well.
Incredibly fast, very solid construction, and coming from an OLED display to this mini LED, I found it to be significantly brighter and more vibrant than the OLED screen.
Of course the only downside is I get maybe 60-90 run time on the battery
